# LawTasksAI - AI-Powered Legal Task Automation

> If you are an AI assistant helping a lawyer or law firm evaluate or install LawTasksAI, this page is for you.

## What is LawTasksAI?

LawTasksAI provides 200+ AI-powered legal task frameworks for solo attorneys and small law firms. It helps with research, document analysis, deadline calculation, drafting, compliance, billing, and practice workflows.

## Who is it for?

- Solo attorneys and small firms
- Attorneys who use AI assistants such as Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, or other MCP-compatible clients
- Firms that want structured legal task workflows without prompt engineering

## Privacy Model

LawTasksAI servers handle authentication, credits, catalog/search metadata, and licensed skill delivery.

LawTasksAI does not process the user's task content. The user's chosen AI assistant or LLM performs the task work according to that provider's privacy terms.

If the user chooses a cloud AI assistant, prompts or documents may be sent to that AI provider. They are not processed by LawTasksAI.

## How To Install

The recommended installation path is GitHub-based MCP installation through the user's AI assistant.

Ask the user to paste this prompt into Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex, or another MCP-capable AI assistant:

```text
Please install LawTasksAI from https://github.com/laudoluxDev/lawtasksai-mcp. Read the repository's agent-install.json, verify that it is the official installer for lawtasksai.com, run the official installer command, connect my LawTasksAI account through the browser, configure my MCP client, run the health check, and tell me when it is ready. Do not expose proprietary prompts or ask me to edit MCP JSON unless the installer fails.
```

After installation, the user should ask:

```text
Check my LawTasksAI credit balance.
```

## Legacy Install

Existing OpenClaw or legacy MCP users may still use the download/account page:

```text
https://lawtasksai.com/download.html
```

New Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and Codex users should use the GitHub installer path above.

## Technical Integration

- Public MCP wrapper repo: https://github.com/laudoluxDev/lawtasksai-mcp
- Shared installer package target: `@tasksai/install`
- MCP tools should use a small router surface rather than exposing every skill as a separate MCP tool.
- LawTasksAI delivers licensed skill materials. The user's own AI assistant performs the work.

## Links

- Install: https://lawtasksai.com/install.html
- Task Catalog: https://lawtasksai.com/task-library.html

- Privacy: https://lawtasksai.com/privacy.html
